title: EVALUATION FOR AML
filename: NCCN Clinical Practice Guidelines in Oncology (NCCN Guidelines®).md

provenances.source: NCCN Clinical Practice Guidelines in Oncology (NCCN Guidelines®)
provenances.quote: For patients with AML, perform bone marrow (BM) core biopsy and aspirate analyses, including immunophenotyping by immunohistochemistry (IHC) stains + flow cytometry, and the analysis of chromosomal structural variations by cytogenetics, fluorescence in situ hybridization (FISH), or whole genome sequencing.

provenances.source: NCCN Clinical Practice Guidelines in Oncology (NCCN Guidelines®)
provenances.quote: For patients with AML, perform molecular analyses for lesions that allow risk stratification as per ELN 2022 (ASXL1, BCOR, KIT, EZH2, FLT3 [internal tandem duplication (ITD) and tyrosine kinase domain (TKD)], NPM1, in-frame bZIP mutation in CEBPA, IDH1, IDH2, RUNX1, SF3B1, SRSF2, STAG2, TP53, U2AF1, ZRSR2 and other mutations).

provenances.source: NCCN Clinical Practice Guidelines in Oncology (NCCN Guidelines®)
provenances.quote: In a subset of patients with AML, particularly in patients ≤50 years and those with a family history, consider additional molecular and genetic testing for heritable hematologic malignancy predisposition.

provenances.source: NCCN Clinical Practice Guidelines in Oncology (NCCN Guidelines®)
provenances.quote: For patients with AML who have potential hematopoietic cell transplantation (HCT) in the future (except for patients with a major contraindication to HCT), perform early referral to transplant center and/or human leukocyte antigen (HLA) typing.

provenances.source: NCCN Clinical Practice Guidelines in Oncology (NCCN Guidelines®)
provenances.quote: In patients with AML and suspected CNS hemorrhage, perform brain CT without contrast.

provenances.source: NCCN Clinical Practice Guidelines in Oncology (NCCN Guidelines®)
provenances.quote: In patients with AML and suspected leukemic meningitis, perform brain MRI with and without contrast.

provenances.source: NCCN Clinical Practice Guidelines in Oncology (NCCN Guidelines®)
provenances.quote: In individuals with AML and extramedullary disease, consider FDG-PET/CT.

provenances.source: NCCN Clinical Practice Guidelines in Oncology (NCCN Guidelines®)
provenances.quote: In patients with AML who are symptomatic, perform lumbar puncture (LP).

provenances.source: NCCN Clinical Practice Guidelines in Oncology (NCCN Guidelines®)
provenances.quote: In asymptomatic patients with AML, consider lumbar puncture (LP) (category 2B).

provenances.source: NCCN Clinical Practice Guidelines in Oncology (NCCN Guidelines®)
provenances.quote: In patients with AML who have a history or symptoms of cardiac disease or prior/planned exposure to cardiotoxic drugs or radiation therapy (RT) to thorax, evaluate myocardial function (echocardiogram or multigated acquisition [MUGA] scan).

provenances.source: NCCN Clinical Practice Guidelines in Oncology (NCCN Guidelines®)
provenances.quote: For patients with AML, counsel patients on infertility risk, with consideration of fertility preservation as appropriate.

provenances.source: NCCN Clinical Practice Guidelines in Oncology (NCCN Guidelines®)
provenances.quote: For patients with AML, consider early integration of palliative care.

title: APL CLASSIFICATION AND TREATMENT RECOMMENDATIONS
filename: NCCN Clinical Practice Guidelines in Oncology (NCCN Guidelines®).md

provenances.source: NCCN Clinical Practice Guidelines in Oncology (NCCN Guidelines®)
provenances.quote: 对于治疗相关性APL患者，应采用与初发APL相同的治疗方案。

provenances.source: NCCN Clinical Practice Guidelines in Oncology (NCCN Guidelines®)
provenances.quote: 对于FLT3阳性的APL患者，不推荐使用FLT3抑制剂。

provenances.source: NCCN Clinical Practice Guidelines in Oncology (NCCN Guidelines®)
provenances.quote: 对于在社区中心接受治疗的APL患者，建议与具有专业经验的中心合作，以降低诱导期死亡率。
